queries.final_sql:
SELECT SUM(pts) AS total_points
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.pts, a.award
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%')) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select sum(pts) as total_points from (select s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.pts, a.award from scoring as s join awardsplayers as a on s.playerid = a.playerid join seriespost as sp on s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner join teams as t on s.tmid = t.tmid where (a.award like '%all-star%')) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(avg_goals_against) AS final_avg_goals_against
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga) AS avg_goals_against
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (t.confid = ab.code) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
GROUP BY t.name) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(avg_goals_against) as final_avg_goals_against from (select t.name as team_name, avg(g.ga) as avg_goals_against from teams as t join goaliessc as g on t.tmid = g.tmid join coaches as c on t.tmid = c.tmid join awardscoaches as a on c.coachid = a.coachid join abbrev as ab on t.confid = ab.code where (t.lgid = 'nhl') and (t.confid = ab.code) and (ab.fullname = 'eastern conference') and (a.award = 'jack adams') group by t.name) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.g) AS total_goals
FROM (SELECT m.playerid, s.year, s.g
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname IN ('Campbell Conference', 'Wales Conference'))) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select sum(leaf_1.g) as total_goals from (select m.playerid, s.year, s.g from master as m join scoring as s on m.playerid = s.playerid join teams as t on s.tmid = t.tmid join abbrev as a on t.confid = a.code where (a.type = 'conference') and (a.fullname in ('campbell conference', 'wales conference'))) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.goalswinner)
FROM (SELECT sp.year, sp.round, sp.series, sp.tmidwinner, sp.goalswinner, c.coachid, a.award
FROM seriespost AS sp
JOIN teams AS t ON sp.tmidwinner = t.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (sp.round = 'QF') AND (a.award = 'First Team All-Star')) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.goalswinner) from (select sp.year, sp.round, sp.series, sp.tmidwinner, sp.goalswinner, c.coachid, a.award from seriespost as sp join teams as t on sp.tmidwinner = t.tmid join coaches as c on t.tmid = c.tmid join awardscoaches as a on c.coachid = a.coachid where (sp.round = 'qf') and (a.award = 'first team all-star')) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(avg_ga_per_game) AS final_avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
GROUP BY t.name
HAVING (AVG(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(avg_ga_per_game) as final_avg_ga_per_game from (select t.name as team_name, avg(g.ga / g.gp) as avg_ga_per_game from teams as t join goaliessc as g on t.tmid = g.tmid join coaches as c on t.tmid = c.tmid join awardscoaches as a on c.coachid = a.coachid where (t.lgid = 'nhl') and (g.min >= 100) and (a.award = 'jack adams') group by t.name having (avg(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)) as leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga) AS avg_goals_allowed
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')
GROUP BY g.playerid, g.year, g.ga) AS leaf_1

FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.tmid, s.g
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year) AS leaf_1

FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies g

JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')) AS leaf_1

JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE ((t.lgid = 'NHL')) AND ((t.confid = ab.code)) AND ((ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference')) AND ((a.award = 'Jack Adams'))) AS leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga, COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC')
GROUP BY t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.gf) from (select t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga, count(distinct a.coachid) as all_star_coaches from teams as t join teamvsteam as tvt on t.tmid = tvt.tmid and t.year = tvt.year join coaches as c on t.tmid = c.tmid join awardscoaches as a on c.coachid = a.coachid where (t.confid = 'cc') group by t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga having (count(distinct a.coachid) >= 1)) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT leaf_2.fullname
FROM (SELECT leaf_1.firstname, leaf_1.lastname, leaf_1.pts, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.confid FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.pts, s.tmid, t.confid
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (s.year >= 1912)) AS leaf_1 ORDER BY leaf_1.pts DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1
JOIN (SELECT a.code, a.fullname
FROM abbrev a
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference')) AS leaf_2 ON leaf_1.confid = leaf_2.code

FROM (SELECT t1.year, t1.tmid, t1.name, t1.ga
FROM teams AS t1
JOIN teamvsteam AS t2 ON t1.tmid = t2.tmid
JOIN teams AS t3 ON t2.oppid = t3.tmid
WHERE (t1.confid = 'CC') AND (t3.confid = 'WA') AND (t2.l = 1)) AS leaf_1

FROM teams AS t2
WHERE (t2.year = 2009)
GROUP BY t2.year) AS t3 ON t1.year = t3.year AND t1.tmid = t3.tmid AND t1.gf = t3.max_gf JOIN abbrev AS a ON t1.confid = a.code

SELECT AVG(CAST(leaf_1.ga AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(leaf_1.gp, 0)) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname AS conference, ap.award
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
JOIN awardsplayers ap ON g.playerid = ap.playerid
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (ap.award IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname, ap.award) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(cast(leaf_1.ga as real) / nullif(leaf_1.gp, 0)) as avg_ga_per_game from (select g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname as conference, ap.award from goalies as g join teams as t on g.tmid = t.tmid join abbrev as a on t.confid = a.code join awardsplayers as ap on g.playerid = ap.playerid where (a.type = 'conference') and (a.fullname = 'campbell conference') and (not ap.award is null) group by g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname, ap.award) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_ga) AS avg_ga_over_teams
FROM (SELECT g.tmid, g.year, AVG(CAST(g.ga AS FLOAT)) AS avg_ga
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN teamvsteam opp ON tvt.oppid = opp.tmid
WHERE (tvt.w > 0) AND (tvt.l >= 0)
GROUP BY g.tmid, g.year) AS leaf_1
GROUP BY leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.year
HAVING (AVG(leaf_1.avg_ga) > 100)

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.avg_ga) as avg_ga_over_teams from (select g.tmid, g.year, avg(cast(g.ga as real)) as avg_ga from goalies as g join combinedshutouts as cs on g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 or g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2 join teams as t on g.tmid = t.tmid join teamvsteam as tvt on t.tmid = tvt.tmid and t.year = tvt.year join teamvsteam as opp on tvt.oppid = opp.tmid where (tvt.w > 0) and (tvt.l >= 0) group by g.tmid, g.year) as leaf_1 group by leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.year having (avg(leaf_1.avg_ga) > 100)

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga / (leaf_1.min / 60.0))
FROM (SELECT m.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.min
FROM master m
JOIN goaliessc g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid
JOIN seriespost s ON g.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND g.year = s.year
WHERE (h.category = 'Player')
GROUP BY m.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.min) AS leaf_1

SELECT SUM(pts)
FROM (SELECT m.playerid, s.year, s.pts
FROM master AS m
JOIN scoring AS s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
LEFT JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON m.playerid = a.playerid
WHERE (a.award = 'Hart' OR a.award IS NULL) AND (s.year = (SELECT MIN(s2.year) FROM scoring AS s2 WHERE s2.playerid = m.playerid))) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_goals_allowed_per_game) AS final_avg_goals_allowed_per_game
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga / g.gp) AS avg_goals_allowed_per_game, AVG(s.g / s.gdg) AS avg_goals_scored_in_shootouts, c.coachid, a.award
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN scoringshootout AS s ON t.tmid = s.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (g.min >= 100) AND (s.g >= 1)
GROUP BY t.name, c.coachid, a.award
HAVING (AVG(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.avg_goals_allowed_per_game) as final_avg_goals_allowed_per_game from (select t.name as team_name, avg(g.ga / g.gp) as avg_goals_allowed_per_game, avg(s.g / s.gdg) as avg_goals_scored_in_shootouts, c.coachid, a.award from teams as t join goaliessc as g on t.tmid = g.tmid join scoringshootout as s on t.tmid = s.tmid join coaches as c on t.tmid = c.tmid join awardscoaches as a on c.coachid = a.coachid where (t.lgid = 'nhl') and (g.min >= 100) and (s.g >= 1) group by t.name, c.coachid, a.award having (avg(g.ga / g.gp) > 0)) as leaf_1

FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.g
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid IN ('EC', 'CC')) AND (s.year < 2000)) AS leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT a.fullname
FROM (SELECT t.confid, MAX(t.w) AS max_wins
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985)
GROUP BY t.confid) AS leaf_1
JOIN teams t ON leaf_1.confid = t.confid
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
JOIN abbrev a ON leaf_1.confid = a.code
WHERE (s.year = 1985 OR s.year = 1986)

signature.normalized_sql: select a.fullname from (select t.confid, max(t.w) as max_wins from teams as t join seriespost as s on t.tmid = s.tmidwinner and t.year = s.year where (s.year >= 1985) group by t.confid) as leaf_1 join teams as t on leaf_1.confid = t.confid join seriespost as s on t.tmid = s.tmidwinner and t.year = s.year join abbrev as a on leaf_1.confid = a.code where (s.year = 1985 or s.year = 1986)

SELECT CONCAT(firstname, ' ', lastname) AS player_name
FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT s.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, s.g
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON t.tmid = sp.tmidloser
WHERE (sp.tmidloser != 'SEA')) ORDER BY g DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.g)
FROM (SELECT m.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.g
FROM master AS m
JOIN scoring AS s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.fullname = 'Eastern Conference' OR a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference' OR a.fullname = 'Wales Conference')) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.games_won)
FROM (SELECT t.tmid AS team_id, t.w AS games_won, COUNT(tv.oppid) AS games_lost
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON t.tmid = tv.tmid
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON t.confid = ca.code
JOIN abbrev AS oa ON ot.confid = oa.code
WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (oa.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tv.l < 10)
GROUP BY t.tmid, t.w
HAVING (COUNT(tv.oppid) > 0)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.games_won) from (select t.tmid as team_id, t.w as games_won, count(tv.oppid) as games_lost from teams as t join teamvsteam as tv on t.tmid = tv.tmid join teams as ot on tv.oppid = ot.tmid join abbrev as ca on t.confid = ca.code join abbrev as oa on ot.confid = oa.code where (ca.fullname = 'campbell conference') and (oa.fullname = 'eastern conference') and (tv.l < 10) group by t.tmid, t.w having (count(tv.oppid) > 0)) as leaf_1

FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.gp, leaf_1.g

JOIN master AS m ON leaf_1.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON leaf_1.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC') AND (leaf_1.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 1989)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.g) from (select m.firstname, m.lastname, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.gp, leaf_1.g from scoring as leaf_1 join master as m on leaf_1.playerid = m.playerid join teams as t on leaf_1.tmid = t.tmid where (t.confid = 'ec') and (leaf_1.year between 1980 and 1989)) as leaf_1

SELECT AVG((leaf_1.g + leaf_1.a) / leaf_1.gp)
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.g, s.a, s.gp
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC') AND (s.year >= 1930 AND s.year <= 2023)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg((leaf_1.g + leaf_1.a) / leaf_1.gp) from (select s.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.g, s.a, s.gp from scoring as s join master as m on s.playerid = m.playerid join teams as t on s.tmid = t.tmid where (t.confid = 'ec') and (s.year >= 1930 and s.year <= 2023)) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf, COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (ab.code = 'EC' OR ab.code = 'WA')
GROUP BY t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.gf) from (select t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf, count(distinct c.coachid) as all_star_coaches from teams as t join teamvsteam as tvt on t.tmid = tvt.tmid and t.year = tvt.year join coaches as c on t.tmid = c.tmid join awardscoaches as a on c.coachid = a.coachid join abbrev as ab on t.confid = ab.code where (ab.code = 'ec' or ab.code = 'wa') group by t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf having (count(distinct c.coachid) >= 1)) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga_per_game) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
JOIN master m ON g.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference' OR a.fullname = 'Wales Conference' OR a.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (h.category = 'Player')) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.ga_per_game) as avg_ga_per_game from (select g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, cast(g.ga as real) / cast(g.gp as real) as ga_per_game from goalies as g join teams as t on g.tmid = t.tmid join abbrev as a on t.confid = a.code join master as m on g.playerid = m.playerid join hof as h on m.hofid = h.hofid where (a.type = 'conference') and (a.fullname = 'campbell conference' or a.fullname = 'wales conference' or a.fullname = 'eastern conference') and (h.category = 'player')) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.w) AS avg_games_won
FROM (SELECT c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t, COUNT(DISTINCT a.award) AS jack_adams_awards, COUNT(DISTINCT tv.oppid) AS games_against_eastern_conf
FROM coaches AS c
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON ot.confid = ca.code
WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tv.w >= 0)
GROUP BY c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.award) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.w) as avg_games_won from (select c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t, count(distinct a.award) as jack_adams_awards, count(distinct tv.oppid) as games_against_eastern_conf from coaches as c join awardscoaches as a on c.coachid = a.coachid join teamvsteam as tv on c.tmid = tv.tmid and c.year = tv.year join teams as ot on tv.oppid = ot.tmid join abbrev as ca on ot.confid = ca.code where (ca.fullname = 'eastern conference') and (tv.w >= 0) group by c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t having (count(distinct a.award) >= 1)) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT SUM(total_points) AS total_points
FROM (SELECT playerid, SUM(pts) AS total_points FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.pts
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code AND ab.type = 'Conference'
WHERE (a.award = 'First Team All-Star' OR a.award = 'Second Team All-Star') AND (ab.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')) AS leaf_1 GROUP BY playerid) AS subquery

signature.normalized_sql: select sum(total_points) as total_points from (select playerid, sum(pts) as total_points from (select s.playerid, s.pts from scoring as s join awardsplayers as a on s.playerid = a.playerid join teams as t on s.tmid = t.tmid join abbrev as ab on t.confid = ab.code and ab.type = 'conference' where (a.award = 'first team all-star' or a.award = 'second team all-star') and (ab.fullname = 'campbell conference')) as leaf_1 group by playerid) as subquery

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga_per_game) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies AS g
JOIN teams AS t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON g.tmid = tv.tmid AND g.year = tv.year
JOIN abbrev AS a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (tv.l = 1 OR tv.w = 1)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.ga_per_game) as avg_ga_per_game from (select g.playerid, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.gp, cast(g.ga as real) / cast(g.gp as real) as ga_per_game from goalies as g join teams as t on g.tmid = t.tmid join teamvsteam as tv on g.tmid = tv.tmid and g.year = tv.year join abbrev as a on t.confid = a.code where (a.fullname = 'campbell conference') and (tv.l = 1 or tv.w = 1)) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.goals_per_game)
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf, t.ga, t.gf / t.g AS goals_per_game
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid
JOIN teams AS ot ON tvt.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON t.confid = ca.code
JOIN abbrev AS oa ON ot.confid = oa.code
WHERE (ca.type = 'Conference') AND (ca.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (oa.type = 'Conference') AND (oa.fullname = 'Wales Conference') AND (tvt.w = 1)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.goals_per_game) from (select t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf, t.ga, t.gf / t.g as goals_per_game from teams as t join teamvsteam as tvt on t.tmid = tvt.tmid join teams as ot on tvt.oppid = ot.tmid join abbrev as ca on t.confid = ca.code join abbrev as oa on ot.confid = oa.code where (ca.type = 'conference') and (ca.fullname = 'campbell conference') and (oa.type = 'conference') and (oa.fullname = 'wales conference') and (tvt.w = 1)) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid
JOIN teams AS ot ON tvt.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON ot.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.year = 2006) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tvt.l = 1)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.gf) from (select t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf from teams as t join teamvsteam as tvt on t.tmid = tvt.tmid join teams as ot on tvt.oppid = ot.tmid join abbrev as ab on ot.confid = ab.code where (t.year = 2006) and (ab.fullname = 'eastern conference') and (tvt.l = 1)) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf, COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.year >= 2006) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference')
GROUP BY t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.gf) from (select t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf, count(distinct a.coachid) as all_star_coaches from teams as t join teamvsteam as tvt on t.tmid = tvt.tmid and t.year = tvt.year join coaches as c on t.tmid = c.tmid join awardscoaches as a on c.coachid = a.coachid join abbrev as ab on t.confid = ab.code where (t.year >= 2006) and (ab.fullname = 'eastern conference') group by t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf having (count(distinct a.coachid) >= 1)) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT team_name
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, COUNT(tv.year) AS games_won
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON t.tmid = tv.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv_opp ON tv.oppid = tv_opp.tmid AND tv.tmid = tv_opp.oppid
WHERE (tv.year BETWEEN 1990 AND 1999) AND (tv.w >= tv.l) AND (tv.oppid = tv_opp.tmid)
GROUP BY t.name) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select team_name from (select t.name as team_name, count(tv.year) as games_won from teams as t join teamvsteam as tv on t.tmid = tv.tmid join teamvsteam as tv_opp on tv.oppid = tv_opp.tmid and tv.tmid = tv_opp.oppid where (tv.year between 1990 and 1999) and (tv.w >= tv.l) and (tv.oppid = tv_opp.tmid) group by t.name) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT SUM(g) AS total_goals
FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.tmid, s.g
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.year = t.year
JOIN seriespost sp ON t.year = sp.year
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC') AND (sp.year = t.year)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select sum(g) as total_goals from (select m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.tmid, s.g from master as m join scoring as s on m.playerid = s.playerid join teams as t on s.year = t.year join seriespost as sp on t.year = sp.year where (t.confid = 'cc') and (sp.year = t.year)) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_goals_against_per_game) AS avg_goals_against_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.tmid, g.year, t.g, t.ga, CAST(t.ga AS REAL) / CAST(t.g AS REAL) AS avg_goals_against_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (g.year = 1982 OR g.year = 1983)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.avg_goals_against_per_game) as avg_goals_against_per_game from (select g.tmid, g.year, t.g, t.ga, cast(t.ga as real) / cast(t.g as real) as avg_goals_against_per_game from goalies as g join teams as t on g.tmid = t.tmid join abbrev as a on t.confid = a.code where (a.type = 'conference') and (a.fullname = 'campbell conference') and (g.year = 1982 or g.year = 1983)) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tvt.l >= 1)) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select avg(leaf_1.gf) from (select t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf from teams as t join teamvsteam as tvt on t.tmid = tvt.tmid and t.year = tvt.year join abbrev as ab on t.confid = ab.code where (ab.fullname = 'eastern conference') and (tvt.l >= 1)) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.g) AS total_goals
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.g, m.firstname, m.lastname, h.year AS hof_year, a.fullname AS conference_name
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
LEFT JOIN hof AS h ON m.hofid = h.hofid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname IN ('Eastern Conference', 'Campbell Conference', 'Wales Conference'))) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select sum(leaf_1.g) as total_goals from (select s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.g, m.firstname, m.lastname, h.year as hof_year, a.fullname as conference_name from scoring as s join master as m on s.playerid = m.playerid left join hof as h on m.hofid = h.hofid join teams as t on s.tmid = t.tmid join abbrev as a on t.confid = a.code where (a.type = 'conference') and (a.fullname in ('eastern conference', 'campbell conference', 'wales conference'))) as leaf_1

queries.final_sql:
SELECT leaf_1.player_name
FROM (SELECT leaf_1.player_name, leaf_1.goals_against, leaf_1.team_name, leaf_1.shutouts FROM (SELECT m.firstname || ' ' || m.lastname AS player_name, s.g AS goals_against, t.name AS team_name, COUNT(cs.idgoalie1) + COUNT(cs.idgoalie2) AS shutouts
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
LEFT JOIN combinedshutouts AS cs ON t.tmid = cs.tmid AND s.year = cs.year
WHERE (s.pos != 'G')
GROUP BY s.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, t.name) AS leaf_1 ORDER BY leaf_1.shutouts DESC, leaf_1.goals_against DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1

signature.normalized_sql: select leaf_1.player_name from (select leaf_1.player_name, leaf_1.goals_against, leaf_1.team_name, leaf_1.shutouts from (select m.firstname || ' ' || m.lastname as player_name, s.g as goals_against, t.name as team_name, count(cs.idgoalie1) + count(cs.idgoalie2) as shutouts from scoring as s join master as m on s.playerid = m.playerid join teams as t on s.tmid = t.tmid left join combinedshutouts as cs on t.tmid = cs.tmid and s.year = cs.year where (s.pos <> 'g') group by s.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, t.name) as leaf_1 order by leaf_1.shutouts desc, leaf_1.goals_against desc limit 1) as leaf_1
